description_long: This house is a modern residential property set within a spacious, fenced lot, featuring a main building with a flat roof and a prominent blue oval swimming pool in the backyard. The property is accessed by a long driveway lined with evenly spaced trees, leading to a garage and a paved entry area. The main structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and a mix of white and light brown exterior finishes, with large windows providing ample natural light. The backyard is expansive and mostly open, bordered by a low wall, and includes a pool area with adjacent patio space. The front of the house is landscaped with additional trees and shrubs, creating a welcoming approach from the street. The overall design emphasizes openness, privacy, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a blue oval pool, set on a large fenced lot with a tree-lined driveway and landscaped front yard.
description_view_0: From this view, the long tree-lined driveway and the main entrance to the house are clearly visible, with the house and pool set back from the street.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the house, the garage, and the extensive landscaping along the driveway, with the pool partially visible behind the main building.
description_view_2: The backyard and pool area are most prominent here, showing the open space and the rear facade of the house, as well as the boundary wall enclosing the property.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the rear and side of the house, the pool, and the full extent of the fenced lot, with the driveway and street visible in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a paved approach, minimal steps, and a simple modern door with no porch or columns, framed by landscaping.
